name: strideos-harness
description: An open-source StrideOS skill plugin package and local reference implementation for endurance coaching.

scripts.setup: npm install && npm run doctor && npm start
scripts.verify: npm run validate:plugin && npm run doctor && npm run check && npm test
scripts.check: node --check scripts/validate-plugin.mjs && node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/onboarding.mjs && node --check src/athlete-analysis.mjs && node --check src/training-plan.mjs && node --check src/nutrition.mjs && node --check src/dashboard.mjs && node --check src/feedback.mjs && node --check src/automations.mjs && node --check src/automation-cli.mjs && node --check src/doctor.mjs && node --check src/connectors.mjs && node --check src/imports.mjs && node --check src/harness.mjs && node --check src/openai.mjs && node --check src/garmin.mjs && node --check src/store.mjs && node --check src/reset.mjs && node --check src/env.mjs && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/service-worker.js
